homeDescription: Manage departments and employees from a clean client application connected to an ASP.NET Core REST API.
homeDepartmentsDescription: Create, edit, delete, and review company departments.
homeEmployeesDescription: Manage employee records and assign each employee to a department.
departmentsDescription: Review department records and keep company structure organized.
deleteDepartmentWarning: This action will permanently delete this department. Please make sure no employees are assigned to it before continuing.
employeesDescription: Review employee profiles, department assignments, and record details.
addDepartmentBeforeEmployees: Please add at least one department before adding employees.
deleteEmployeeWarning: This action will permanently delete this employee record. You cannot undo this action.
name: Name
loginDescription: Use the configured test account to receive a JWT token before managing data.
authRequired: Please sign in before opening this page.
apiErrorNetwork: Cannot connect to the backend API. Please check that the backend is running and the API URL is correct.
apiErrorValidationFailed: Validation failed. Please check the submitted data.
apiErrorBadRequest: Bad request. Please check the submitted data.
apiErrorForbidden: Forbidden. You do not have permission to access this resource.
apiErrorNotFound: The requested record or endpoint was not found.
apiErrorMethodNotAllowed: HTTP method is not allowed for this endpoint.
apiErrorUnsupportedMediaType: Unsupported media type. Please check the request content type.
apiErrorServer: Server error. Please contact the system administrator.
apiErrorDepartmentHasEmployees: This department cannot be deleted because employees are assigned to it.
apiErrorDateJoinedBeforeBirth: Date joined should not be earlier than date of birth.
apiErrorInvalidImageType: Invalid image type. Allowed types are .jpg, .jpeg, .png, and .webp.
apiErrorInvalidImageContentType: Invalid image content type. Allowed content types are image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp.
apiErrorImageTooLarge: Image size must not be larger than 2 MB.
apiErrorFieldMaxLength: Some text fields are longer than the allowed maximum length.
